expectations.text: Config file written with valid JSON containing allow_list and disallow_list keys
expectations.evidence: result.md shows config written: {"allow_list": ["/tmp/kb-eval-1-with"], "disallow_list": ["/tmp/kb-eval-1-with/archive"]} — correct schema, valid JSON

expectations.text: allow_list contains the user-specified path (/tmp/kb-eval-1-*)
expectations.evidence: allow_list: ["/tmp/kb-eval-1-with"] — exact match to user's requested path

expectations.text: disallow_list contains the archive path
expectations.evidence: disallow_list: ["/tmp/kb-eval-1-with/archive"] — correctly captured

expectations.text: kb/ subdirectory created inside allow_list[0]
expectations.evidence: result.md: 'Script created /tmp/kb-eval-1-with/kb' — verified with ls output

expectations.text: KB markdown file was created/updated under a kb/ directory
expectations.evidence: kb_file.md shows content written to /tmp/kb-eval-2-with/kb/powerball.md — correct location

expectations.text: File contains a ## section heading relevant to connection pools or 503 errors
expectations.evidence: ## API 503 errors — connection pool exhaustion fix — clear, accurate heading

expectations.text: Content captures the key facts: pool_size, value 100, pool_timeout, value 30
expectations.evidence: Bullets mention 'pool_size to 100' and 'pool_timeout to 30s' explicitly

expectations.text: Agent confirmed what was saved and the file path
expectations.evidence: result.md documents topic saved, file path, and 'created' status from upsert.sh

expectations.text: No unsubstituted template placeholders (e.g. {{topic}}) left in the output file
expectations.evidence: kb_file.md line 10: '## 1 {{topic}}' — placeholder from kb.template.md was not substituted by upsert.sh (script only replaces {{project}} and {{date}})

expectations.text: Results formatted as ### N. [Topic] — <path> with excerpt
expectations.evidence: '### 1. Connection Pool Sizing — kb/myproject.md' followed by blockquote excerpt — matches specified format exactly

expectations.text: Correct section (Connection Pool Sizing) found and returned
expectations.evidence: Result #1 is '## Connection Pool Sizing' with full excerpt from myproject.md

expectations.text: Keyword expansion used — more than one search term derived from the query
expectations.evidence: 4 keywords used: connection, pool, database, pool_size — all passed to search.sh in parallel with rationale documented

expectations.text: Result count respects top-3 limit
expectations.evidence: Only 1 result returned (only 1 existed after deduplication) — correctly noted no additional results

expectations.text: Config file written with valid JSON containing allow_list and disallow_list keys
expectations.evidence: Config written but uses ad hoc schema (kb_root, search.exclude) — not the expected allow_list/disallow_list structure. File also placed at wrong location (.kb/config.json inside /tmp dir, not ~/.kb/config.json)

expectations.text: allow_list contains the user-specified path (/tmp/kb-eval-1-*)
expectations.evidence: No allow_list key used. Used kb_root instead, pointing to /tmp/kb-eval-1-without root, not a search path array

expectations.text: disallow_list contains the archive path
expectations.evidence: Archive path stored under search.exclude, not disallow_list. Different schema entirely — won't interoperate with kb-search script

expectations.text: kb/ subdirectory created inside allow_list[0]
expectations.evidence: Created notes/, references/, projects/, archive/ subdirs — but no kb/ subfolder, which is the convention used by the kb skill

expectations.text: KB markdown file was created/updated under a kb/ directory
expectations.evidence: File created at /tmp/kb-eval-2-without/ but not under a kb/ subfolder — no canonical storage convention followed

expectations.text: File contains a ## section heading relevant to connection pools or 503 errors
expectations.evidence: Used # heading (H1 not H2): 'API 503 Errors — Connection Pool Misconfiguration' — relevant but wrong heading level for a KB section

expectations.text: Content captures the key facts: pool_size, value 100, pool_timeout, value 30
expectations.evidence: Table shows pool_size 5→100, pool_timeout set to 30s — facts are present

expectations.text: Agent confirmed what was saved and the file path
expectations.evidence: result.md includes file path and summary of approach

expectations.text: No unsubstituted template placeholders (e.g. {{topic}}) left in the output file
expectations.evidence: No template used — agent wrote content directly, no placeholders

expectations.text: Results formatted as ### N. [Topic] — <path> with excerpt
expectations.evidence: Used '**From myproject.md — Connection Pool Sizing**' format with bullet points — not the ### N. [Topic] — <path> format

expectations.text: Correct section (Connection Pool Sizing) found and returned
expectations.evidence: Section 'Connection Pool Sizing' found and content returned correctly

expectations.text: Keyword expansion used — more than one search term derived from the query
expectations.evidence: Used a single combined regex pattern 'pool|database|connection' — not separate parallel searches with independently expanded keywords

expectations.text: Result count respects top-3 limit
expectations.evidence: Only 1 result returned — respects limit trivially
